questions.explanation:
3rd least prime number is 5

So, value of Q = 
 + 1 = 126

And value of P = 126 × 
 = 30

Logic in the series:

14 × 2 + 2 = 30

30 × 2 + 2 = 62

62 × 2 + 2 = 126

126 × 2 + 2 = 254

And next term of the series = 254 × 2 + 2 = 510

questions.questionHtml:
Direction: Study the data carefully and answer

the following question.

A series is given with one wrong term in it.

25, 35, 20, 40, 15, 55

If a new series is formed, whose 1st term is the

wrong term of the given series and follows the

same pattern as in the given series, then find

that the 5th term of the new series will be equal

to the which term of the given series?
questions.explanation:
Logic in the given series:

25 + 10 = 35

35 - 15 = 20

20 + 20 = 40

40 - 25 = 15

15 + 30 = 45(55)

So, the wrong term in the given series = 55

Now,

1st term of the new series = 55

2nd term of the new series = 55 + 10 = 65

3rd term of the new series = 65 - 15 = 50

4th term of the new series = 50 + 20 = 70

5th term of the new series = 70 - 25 = 45

So, the 5th term of the new series will be equal

to the 6th term of the given series, which will

come in place of the wrong term.

questions.questionHtml:
Direction: Study the data carefully and answer

the following question.

A series is given below with one wrong term in it.

53, 68, 98, 143, 201, 278

Find the difference between the wrong term of

the series and the next term of the series?
questions.explanation:
Logic in the series:

53 + 15 = 68

68 + 30 = 98

98 + 45 = 143

143 + 60 = 203(201)

203 + 75 = 278

So, the wrong term of the series = 201

And the next term of the series = 278 + 90 = 368

Required difference = 368 - 201 = 167

If a new series is formed, whose 1st term is P and

follows the same pattern as in the given series.

Find the 4th term of the new series?

questions.questionHtml:
Direction: Study the data carefully and answer

the following question.

A series is given below with wrong term P in it.

48, 44, 53, 35, 62, 26

If a new series is formed, whose 1st term is P and

follows the same pattern as in the given series.

Find the 4th term of the new series?
questions.explanation:
Logic in the given series:

48 - 
 = 44

44 + 
 = 53

53 - 
 = 37(35)

37 + 
 = 62

62 - 
 = 26

So, the wrong term of the given series = P = 35

Now,

1st term of the new series = 35

2nd term of the new series = 35 - 
 = 31

3rd term of the new series = 31 + 
 = 40

4th term of the new series = 40 - 
 = 24
